must_detect.matched_text: DSAR process: submit Form-DSAR-01 to dpo@harborpacific.ph or call the Harbor Pacific Privacy Helpline 15550 for general guidance; do not send IDs via helpline.

Scope: HR, tax, banking, and capital-markets records for a Philippines issuer listed on Isla Capital Exchange (ICX) and registered with Bayani Securities Commission (BSC).
Personal data is information from which identity is apparent or can be reasonably and directly ascertained with other data; MNPI is information a reasonable investor would consider important that is not public under SRC rules.
Form labels collected: Full Name, Role/Position, TIN [___-___-___-___], SSS [__-_______-__], PhilHealth [____-_________-_], UMID [____-______-__], Passport No. [_________].
Examples of identifiers we do not store unless required: TIN 123-456-789-999 (format present but invalid), SSS 12-3456789-0 (checksum invalid), Payroll Account 0000-0000-0000 (masked).
One-off lawful positive for onboarding verification: Authorized Signatory — Philippine Passport No. PX7345129 (kept for 1 year post-onboarding, then deleted).
Company identifiers used for public filings: BSC Reg. No. CS2099-7654321 (illustrative), ICX Symbol: HPRI (placeholder only; not a live ticker), Registered Office: [Address on file].
We do not include MNPI in HR or payroll systems; insider-list entries are maintained separately and disclosed only as required after public announcements.
Routine transfers: role email to payroll (payroll-inbox@harborpacific.ph), bank partner Baybay Capital Bank, Inc. [Corporate Account Ref: 88-000000-01], and external auditor (vendor ID: AUD-0000).
DSAR process: submit Form-DSAR-01 to dpo@harborpacific.ph or call the Harbor Pacific Privacy Helpline 15550 for general guidance; do not send IDs via helpline.
